3076930.name: StarRider
3076930.description:
Protect the planet as The Star Guardian Star Rider

Take down hordes of enemies, and fight Giant Bosses in fast-paced 3d flight combat. Take on various missions, fly through cities and the outer stratosphere, and fight to save the planet.

Hailstorm of bullets 

Master your dodging and aiming skills so you don't become an air scrap from the enemy's hailstorm of bullets. Master the Star Rider afterimage to turn the tide of combat. Complete the mission objective to save the other Star Guardians. 

Unlock Art Pieces

As you progress through the story unlock various art pieces from concept art to backgrounds

Giant Bosses

The face of giant otherworld aliens that seek to destroy Earth. The River of Star Cetus, The Turbulent Garuda Altair, and The Giant Red Buster Antares it's up to the Star Guardian, Star Rider
